title: Discover the Phenomenal Salar de Uyuni

scenes.text: This salt flat creates stunning reflections that seem endless.
This is Salar de Uyuni, located in southwestern Bolivia.
It covers over 10,000 square kilometers, making it the largest salt flat in the world.
During the rainy season, it transforms into a gigantic mirror.
scenes.label: GIANT MIRROR

scenes.text: Follow if you love to travel from your screen.

description: 📍 Salar de Uyuni, Bolivia. The largest salt flat on Earth, known for its breathtaking mirror reflections. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
